name: annotatekit
description: Turn iOS visual feedback into actionable coding-agent context.

interface.longDescription: AnnotateKit connects visual feedback captured directly in an iOS Debug build to coding agents. Inspect pending annotations with accessibility identity, nearby text, view hierarchy, styles, position, and intent; reply to the reviewer; then acknowledge, resolve, or dismiss each item.
defaultPrompt: Show my pending iOS UI feedback.
Implement and resolve the selected iOS annotation.
Reply to the latest annotation asking for clarification.
